features.name: dual_port_memory_instantiation_with_asymmetric_address_widths
features.description: Code should include a memory module instantiation where the memory depth is 10 (4-bit address) but external ports use 10-bit addresses, with reader and writer ports using different address signal sources

features.name: memory_conditional_read_with_x_resolution
features.description: Code should include a conditional read assignment where memory data output resolves to X when read enable is deasserted

features.name: memory_synchronous_write_with_enable_and_mask
features.description: Code should include a synchronous memory write using an always block with clock edge, write enable, and mask signals combined to conditionally store data

features.name: reg_array_memory_declaration
features.description: Code should include a reg array declaration used as memory storage with data width and depth specified
